_description: Network Sketcher Local MCP Edition configuration. The MCP server reads this file at startup. Each top-level entry has 'value' (the actual setting) and 'description' (human-readable note).

version.description: Network Sketcher Local MCP Edition version. Informational only.

working_directory.description: OPTIONAL initial workspace. If a non-empty absolute path is provided, the server uses it as the active workspace at startup (auto-created if missing). If empty (recommended for cross-platform portability), no workspace is active at startup; the AI agent must call suggest_workspace() to see OS-appropriate candidates and then set_workspace(path) to pick one. Use '~' for home expansion.

log_level.description: Log level for the MCP server's own log (DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR). Logs are written to stderr (visible in the MCP host's log panel).

ai_context_show_commands.description: List of show commands executed in order by the get_network_state tool. Same set as the Online edition's AI context.

command_timeout_seconds.description: (Reserved; not used in the current version) Intended as a per-CLI-call timeout in seconds. The value is currently ignored by the server. Tracked for a future release.
